forecast.shortForecast: Chance Rain Showers then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
forecast.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers between 9am and 2pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Partly sunny. High near 70, with temperatures falling to around 67 in the afternoon. Southwest wind 5 to 17 mph, with gusts as high as 29 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. nubsNob.comments: Thank-you for a fantastic winter at Nub's Nob! This was a true Northern Michigan winter with 188" of snow and sustained cold. This summer our Crew will be busy replacing our beloved Orange lift with a new fixed grip quad lift from SkyTrac. This lift is built in the USA and will be nearly identical to the new Green lift that was installed in 2023. Thanks for skiing and riding at Nub's Nob.
